(friend of Jehovah).
  1. Son of Ahitub, grandson of Phinehas and great-grandson of Eli, succeeded his father as high priest in the reign of Saul. (1ï¿½Samuel 14:3,18) Ahiah is probably the same person as Ahimelech the son of Ahitub. (B.C. 980.)
  2. One of Solomonï¿½s princes. (1ï¿½Kings 4:3)
  3. A prophet of Shiloh, (1ï¿½Kings 14:2) hence called the Shilonite, (1ï¿½Kings 11:29) of whom we have two remarkable prophecies extant, the one in (1ï¿½Kings 11:30-39) addressed to Jeroboam, announcing the rending of the ten tribes from Solomon; the other in (1ï¿½Kings 14:6-16) in which he foretold the death of Abijah, the kingï¿½s son, who was sick, and the destruction of Jeroboamï¿½s house on account of the images which he had set up. (1ï¿½Kings 14:2,3) (B.C. about 956.)
  4. Father of Baasha king of Israel. (1ï¿½Kings 15:27,33)
  5. Son of Jerahmeel. (1ï¿½Chronicles 2:25)
  6. Son of Bela. (1ï¿½Chronicles 8:7)
  7. One of Davidï¿½s mighty men. (1ï¿½Chronicles 11:36)
  8. A Levite in Davidï¿½s reign. (1ï¿½Chronicles 26:20)
  9. One of the "heads of the people" who joined in the covenant with Nehemiah. (Nehemiah 10:26)
